FINDING: api/routers/users.py:42:BLOCKING
WHAT: response shape change on `/api/users` is a breaking API change for existing callers
EVIDENCE: api/routers/users.py:42
IMPACT: dashboard UserList component will break
OPTIONS:
1. version the endpoint
DIFF_LINE: api/routers/users.py:42
REACHABLE_PATH: dashboard fetches /api/users on load
REJECTED_ALTERNATIVE: in-place change without versioning loses the prior contract
